title: Colonic epithelial cell isolation for Single Cell RNA-sequencing
author: David Fawkner-Corbett
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ztrf6m6

steps.title: Biopsies transported on ice in 10ml of transport medium
steps.instruction: Biopsies transported on ice in 10ml of transport medium

steps.title: Wash with 10ml of cold (4degree)...
steps.instruction: Wash with 10ml of cold (4degree) wash medium, shake, remove media, repeat a total of 3 times

steps.title: Transfer biopsies to 5mL warm (water...
steps.instruction: Transfer biopsies to 5mL warm (water bath at 37 degree) chelation medium

steps.title: Incubate at 37C for 20mins –...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37C for 20mins – shake after 10mins and 20mins

steps.title: Remove supernatant, Transfer biopsies to fresh 5ml warm chelation medium
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant, Transfer biopsies to fresh 5ml warm chelation medium

steps.title: Incubate at 37C for 10mins
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37C for 10mins

steps.title: Vortex 2 x 5s (or 5-10 hard shakes)
steps.instruction: Vortex 2 x 5s (or 5-10 hard shakes)

steps.title: Allow biopsies to settle
steps.instruction: Allow biopsies to settle. Remove supernatant with FCS-coated pasteur, keep supernatant and replace 5ml warm chelation medium on biopsies. Return to 37C water bath.

steps.title: Examine supernatant
steps.instruction: Examine supernatant. If it contains crypts, spin down at 300G 4mins 4C

steps.title: Resuspend crypt pellet in 2ml cold...
steps.instruction: Resuspend crypt pellet in 2ml cold transport medium, place in 15ml Falcon on ice.

steps.title: Repeat steps 5-10 and pool crypt...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 5-10 and pool crypt containing fractions (3 or max 4 times)

steps.title: Spin down pooled crypt suspension (300g, 4mins)
steps.instruction: Spin down pooled crypt suspension (300g, 4mins)

steps.title: Resuspend in 3ml warm TrypLE Express...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 3ml warm TrypLE Express with 50ug/ml DNAse at 37C

steps.title: Incubate 45mins at 37C in incubator...
steps.instruction: Incubate 45mins at 37C in incubator with agitation or rotation (e.g. MACSmix.)

steps.title: Quench with 3ml of Transport medium supplemented with 5% FCS
steps.instruction: Quench with 3ml of Transport medium supplemented with 5% FCS

steps.title: Remove filter, wash with 15ml Transport...
steps.instruction: Remove filter, wash with 15ml Transport Medium supplemented with 5% FCS

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant. Wash pellet with 10ml Wash medium

steps.title: Spin 300G 5mins
steps.instruction: Spin 300G 5mins.

steps.title: Very carefully remove supernatant until est
steps.instruction: Very carefully remove supernatant until est. 1ml remains. Do not disturb pellet, resuspend pellet in this.

steps.title: Run through 30um cell strainer (prepped...
steps.instruction: Run through 30um cell strainer (prepped with FCS) and wash through with 5ml of PBS + 0.04% BSA

steps.title: Spin 300G 4 mins, aspirate until <1ml
steps.instruction: Spin 300G 4 mins, aspirate until <1ml. re-suspend in <1ml of remaining PBS +0.04% BSA, transfer to Eppendorf and add additional volume of PBS +0.04% BSA to make 1ml total.

steps.title: Take 10uL for count (Trypan blue, Invitrogen Countess or haemocytometer)
steps.instruction: Take 10uL for count (Trypan blue, Invitrogen Countess or haemocytometer). For 10x count each sample x3 to obtain average count and viability. Ensure high viability.

steps.title: Centrifuge (300G, 5 mins) and re-suspend...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge (300G, 5 mins) and re-suspend using live count to concentration of 1000 cells/ul (1x10^6 / ml).

steps.title: Process on 10x using manufacturers protocol
steps.instruction: Process on 10x using manufacturers protocol

steps.title: Filter with 70um cell strainer (prepped...
steps.instruction: Filter with 70um cell strainer (prepped with FCS) into 50ml Falcon, wash through with 5 ml of transport medium +5% FCS

steps.title: Spin filtrate 300G 4mins
steps.instruction: Spin filtrate 300G 4mins
